message(STATUS "Configuring visual icpp for cutter++...")
project(visualicpp-cutter++)

# c++
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 20)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED)

# generate debugger protocol data object
add_custom_command(
  OUTPUT icppdbg.pb.cc
  COMMAND ${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/third/protobuf/protoc 
    -I=${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/proto --cpp_out=${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR} 
    ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/proto/icppdbg.proto
  DEPENDS ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/proto/icppdbg.proto
  VERBATIM)

add_library(icppdbg MODULE
  icppdbg.cpp
  ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/src/platform.cpp

  # auto generated by protoc
  icppdbg.pb.cc
)

target_link_libraries(icppdbg PRIVATE
  boost_asio
  libprotobuf
)
set_target_properties(icppdbg PROPERTIES PREFIX "")
target_include_directories(icppdbg PRIVATE
  ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}

  boost_asio
  libprotobuf
)

add_dependencies(icppdbg protoc)
message(STATUS "Configuring visual icpp for cutter++ done")
